message:
test: extend modifier parsing tests with additional coverage

Add 8 additional test functions for BEAD-108 modifier parsing coverage:
- key_action_mixed_alias_combinations: test mixing different aliases
- key_action_two_modifier_combinations: exhaustive 2-modifier combos
- key_action_three_modifier_combinations: all 3-modifier combos
- key_action_modifiers_with_function_keys: F1-F12 with modifiers
- key_action_modifiers_with_special_keys: enter/space/tab/etc
- key_action_modifiers_with_arrow_keys: navigation keys
- key_action_modifiers_with_punctuation: minus/equals symbols
- key_action_case_variations_all_aliases: comprehensive case tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
